Sun-Sun: In Vedic astrology, the Sun is considered the significator of the father, soul, fame, government, good health, and pitta (bile) in the human body. During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 3 months and 18 days. During this period, the Sun will have a significant impact on your life. You are likely to receive special rights or authority at your workplace, which will increase your social prestige. You will establish relationships with rich and famous people in society. You may receive benefits from the government and officials. Due to your connections in society, you will get many opportunities to move forward. There is a strong possibility that your financial condition will become robust. A time will come when everyone will know your name. However, an egoistic tendency may dominate your nature, which can affect your relationships. There might be bitterness in your speech, and your body temperature may rise. Long journeys are possible. You may enjoy spending time in the mountains. A thoughtful attitude will remain. If any court case is pending during this time, the decision is likely to come in your favor.
Sun-Moon: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of the Moon will last for 6 months. The Sun and the Moon are friends with each other, but their natures are opposite. While the Sun represents the fire element, the Moon is cool. Due to these differing natures, you will see mixed results. During this time, you can benefit from the help of family and friends. The flow of wealth will increase, and friends will become a source of profit for you, being able to help you. During this phase of your life, you are likely to build relationships with famous people. Additionally, you will gain new recognition and fame, and your social status will rise. You will also achieve victory over your enemies. Apart from all this, there may be problems related to water-borne diseases. Jaundice could be a major illness affecting your health. During this period, you will enjoy material comforts in life and may purchase new clothes, jewelry, etc.
Sun-Mars: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Mars will be 4 months and 6 days. The Sun and Mars share a sense of mutual friendship. Both are planets of the fire element, so their combination brings natural strength and fierceness to a person. As a result, many major changes can be seen. Therefore, if you experience anger, it is better if you can control it. During this time, you will accumulate many valuable items such as gold jewelry, gems, pearls, and expensive clothes. You will receive honors from the government or government authorities. Your social prestige will increase. Some auspicious or religious events may be completed at home. This energy will inspire you to do something new in life. You will take some bold decisions during this time, the results of which will be seen in the future. In addition to all this, you may suffer from fever, headache, and blood-related disorders. Anger may increase.
Sun-Rahu: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Rahu will be 10 months and 24 days. The Sun and Rahu are enemies to each other. Usually, bad results are seen during Rahu's Antardasha, but sometimes it can also be auspicious for a person. Mental unrest is likely during this period. You will remain worried due to some unknown fear. False allegations or defamation may come upon you. You will experience tension and anxiety during this time. Disputes may occur. There could also be problems with family members. Opponents and enemies will try to dominate you and may create trouble for you. At the same time, your position and authority at work may decrease. You may become mentally disturbed and might not get the desired results from your decisions.
Sun-Jupiter: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be 9 months and 18 days. The Sun and Jupiter are good friends. The Sun is the king and Jupiter is his minister, so good results will be obtained from their combination. During this time, you may participate in religious activities. Being involved in religious rituals and works will increase your popularity in society. You will also move towards accumulating wealth during this period. You may plan for your future. You will work hard to groom yourself. You will meet famous and influential people. You may get involved in activities related to children, and as a result of such work, you can become stress-free. In addition, you will maintain dominance over opponents and enemies.
Sun-Saturn: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Saturn will be 11 months and 12 days. Lord Saturn is the son of Lord Sun, but there is a feeling of mutual enmity between father and son, so problems like disputes and conflicts are likely to occur. During this time, there may be a dispute with your loved ones or spouse. You will feel mental unrest, and tension will increase in your behavior. Friends may stand against you due to ideological differences. A feeling of laziness will grow in you. Additionally, detachment from work and a tendency to do useless things may dominate you. Health-related disorders can increase your troubles. There is a possibility of conflict with your father, and his health may also decline.
Sun-Mercury: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Mercury will be 10 months and 6 days. The Sun and Mercury are neutral towards each other, so these two planets give mixed results. During this time, a lack of enthusiasm and mental stress may dominate you. Expenses may continuously increase, and your financial condition may also be affected. Small joys will also keep coming during this period. You will be able to keep yourself busy with the help of your intellect. In addition to all this, blood infections, skin diseases, dental issues, and throat-related disorders may affect your health. Harshness in your speech may increase, which could hurt your loved ones or their feelings. There will also come a time when you will think carefully and make the right decisions. Based on your intelligence, you will be able to face all challenges.
Sun-Ketu: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the Antardasha of Ketu will last for 4 months and 6 days. The Sun and Ketu have mutual enmity, so a person has to face bad experiences during the Dasha of this planet. Your mental stress will increase during this period. You may be affected by disorders like fever, bile issues, and eye pain. Anger and instability may increase in your nature. Your ego may inflate. In addition to all this, you may have to face injuries and accidents. For some reasons, you might have to stay away from your family, or feelings of separation may arise in your family life.
Sun-Venus: During the Mahadasha of the Sun, the duration of Venus's Antardasha will be 12 months. The Sun is the king, and Venus is the significator of material pleasures, but there is mutual enmity between both planets; hence, mixed results will be obtained from them. During this time, your interest in items like pearls and jewelry may increase. You may form a friendship with an inauspicious person of the opposite sex. There is a possibility of foreign travel. You might face failure in highly promising work. Family disputes can also occur. You can lead a life full of material comforts, but you will not feel satisfied with it. Apart from all this, high fever, headache, ear pain, and body aches may trouble you during this period. On the other hand, you may live a prosperous life.
Moon-Moon: The Moon is the planet related to the mother, mind, women, joy, enthusiasm, love, emotions, water, mental peace, and art. The Moon also controls human emotions. During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of the Moon will be 10 months. During this period, the Moon will have a complete impact on your life. Therefore, your interest in art, music, and beauty may increase. In addition, it is also possible for you to get involved in some kind of artistic work. You may buy expensive clothes to beautify yourself and impress others. Your friendship will be with respectable and positive-thinking people. Your reputation in society will increase due to your good deeds. Apart from all this, you may go on a pilgrimage with relatives or loved ones. You can gain through property or cattle. You may suffer from wind-related (Vata) disorders.
Moon-Mars: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Mars will be for 7 months. The Moon and Mars have a good relationship, but there is a difference in their natures. Mars is a planet of the fire element; the Moon is a planet of the water element. Due to these opposite natures, these planets transmit a lot of energy, and its effect falls on the person's mind and work-related outcomes, which are usually slow. There is a possibility of wealth loss during this time. You may also have to change your current residence. Friends and siblings may suffer harm, especially a younger brother may be in danger. Parents and other people could also face risks. Problems may arise due to blood and bile (Pitta) disorders. Despite all this, starting a fire-related business will yield good results. There are chances of getting business benefits. You will need to maintain normal relations with all women. In matters of love, you will have to try to maintain a good relationship with your loved one. Love by respecting each other's feelings. This is the best time to get good results from hard work.
Moon-Rahu: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Rahu will be one year and 6 months. The Moon and Rahu share mutual enmity. Bad effects are often seen during Rahu's Antardasha, although sometimes it is beneficial. A person can achieve a lot of progress through it. During this time, your opponents and enemies may trouble you, or you may suffer from health-related issues. Mental instability can affect your decision-making ability. Your expenses may increase during this period. You will need to maintain good relations with siblings and friends. Furthermore, you may suddenly receive some good news, and this news will make you ambitious. Avoid eating contaminated food, as it can be harmful to your health. Try to avoid unnecessary disputes.
Moon-Jupiter: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be for one year and four months. The Moon and Jupiter have a good relationship with each other, so good and pleasant results are seen due to their influence during this Antardasha period. Trends of liberalism and charity will increase. You may get high financial gains and will be able to buy new vehicles. During this time, you will enjoy delicious food, especially sweets. Your weight may increase during this period, so it is better to be mindful of your diet. Along with this, you will enjoy material comforts. You will also receive benefits through the government and any other institution. You may also get the company of learned people, from which you will benefit greatly. You will gain experience. Family size may increase, and you may organize some religious events at home.
Moon-Saturn: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Saturn will be 1 year and 7 months. Saturn acts like an enemy towards the Moon, but the Moon maintains a neutral nature with Saturn, so some controversies arise due to the influence of these two planets, and there is a possibility of conflict. During this time, you will feel mental unrest, and your mother's health may decline. There will be a fear of theft. Attraction towards intoxicants may increase. The impact of negative thinking can affect your life in many ways. Besides this, an increase in bitterness of speech can create situations of dispute with opponents. During this time, the health of your spouse, children, and siblings may be affected. Do Pranayama and Yoga regularly to maintain mental peace. Enjoy life with your loved ones instead of staying alone. There is a possibility of a change in your current residence.
Moon-Mercury: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Mercury will be about 1 year and 5 months. The Moon and Mercury do not have a mutually good relationship. The Moon is friendly towards Mercury, but Mercury is hostile towards the Moon. As a result, both planets give mixed results. During this time, you will be able to get financial benefits through your mother or maternal side. You will establish contacts with learned and intelligent people during this period. There are also chances of buying new vehicles and property. Additionally, your social status will increase, and you will enjoy material comforts. During this time, arrogance in your behavior and nature will increase, and as a result, you may hurt the feelings of your loved ones.
Moon-Ketu: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Ketu will last for 7 months. The Moon and Ketu have enmity towards each other. The Dasha of these planets usually has a bad effect on human life. Avoid stress and anxiety during this time. Water-borne diseases can also cause problems during this period. Your life partner may remain ill, or you may face problems and difficulties in family life. Besides this, you may become disillusioned with your regular routine, and you will take steps to acquire spiritual knowledge for mental peace. Loss of wealth and health may occur, and there is a specific possibility of suffering from stomach aches.
Moon-Venus: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of Venus will be for 1 year and 8 months. The Moon and Venus signify female happiness and luxury, so prosperity comes in life during this time. However, unlike their significations, the Moon and Venus do not have a good relationship with each other, so people get mixed results due to their influence. During this time, gains can be made through women or people of the opposite sex. There is a possibility of profit and growth in water, agriculture, and cattle-related businesses. Profits are likely from items related to clothes. You will want to enjoy a joyful life and indulge in material pleasures. Apart from this, your mother and you may have to face health-related problems. There is a possibility of differences with women, so maintain balance in your relationships with them.
Moon-Sun: During the Mahadasha of the Moon, the Antardasha of the Sun will be for 6 months. The Moon and the Sun are friends with each other, but their natures are opposite. Where the Sun is fiery, the Moon is water and cool, so mixed results will be seen in this Dasha. During this time, your fame and influence will increase. You will be able to receive honors and benefits from the government or any other organization. You will dominate your opponents, and your enemies will not be able to gather the courage to stand before you. Besides this, prosperity and growth will be seen in life. Any chronic disease may cause trouble. Sometimes there will be an excess of anger in your nature, followed by an increase in instability. You will be able to resolve this.
Mars-Mars: In Vedic astrology, Mars is said to be the significator of energy, strength, courage, ego, property, authority, siblings, and blood-related diseases. During the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of Mars is 27 days. During this time, the influence of Mars will have a big impact on your life. That is why your nature may remain angry and impulsive. Disagreements with brothers and disputes with loved ones can arise during this time. There will be possibilities of hardship and challenges from government organizations, and you may have to face many challenges in completing important tasks or goals. Also, your body temperature may increase. Because of this, there might be a possibility of fever, etc. During this time, physical pain may occur from wounds or boils.
Mars-Rahu: During the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 1 year and 18 days. Rahu and Mars do not have a good relationship with each other. There is a feeling of enmity between them. During this time, there may be a dispute with government authorities, or there may be a possibility of theft. The strength of your opponents may increase, and they may try to tarnish your image. Use electronic equipment carefully, otherwise, there will be a possibility of electric shock or fire. Wealth loss may also occur during this time. Besides this, you may remain mentally unstable and disturbed. There will be bitterness in your behavior, which can disturb the mental peace of your loved ones. It would be better to refrain from doing wrong things during this period. Self-confidence will increase, but keep in mind that overconfidence can also be harmful.
Mars-Jupiter: The Antardasha of Jupiter within the Mahadasha of Mars will be approximately 11 months and 6 days. Since Mars and Jupiter have a feeling of friendship with each other, you will get good and pleasant results from this Dasha. During this time, you will be able to make profits and accumulate wealth. The possibilities of gaining through the government and important people in society will increase. It is a good time for buying land or constructing a house. Health will improve more than before, and energy will increase. You will be able to easily accomplish all tasks with your intellect. You will be able to spend happy moments with friends and children. In addition to this, your inclination towards religious and spiritual activities will be strong. You will also be able to buy a new vehicle during this time. There is a possibility of going on a pilgrimage. You will dominate your opponents. Your social prestige will increase. Phlegm-related problems may occur in the body.
Mars-Saturn: During the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of Saturn will be for 1 year, 1 month, and 9 days. Mars and Saturn have enmity with each other, so you may get bad results during this Dasha period. Mental stress may increase during this time. You will not be able to concentrate and focus on your goals. Instability and irritability may increase in your behavior. There will be a possibility of disputes with your spouse, children, and loved ones. During this time, you may become a victim of an accident or any disease. There is also a possibility of theft, and your enemies will be stronger compared to you. Losses can also occur in financial matters. Additionally, if you are far away from home, you may be forced to return home due to illness. During this time, you will have to face all challenges with courage and move forward.
Mars-Mercury: The Antardasha of Mercury within the Mahadasha of Mars will be approximately 11 months and 27 days. Mars and Mercury do not have a good relationship with each other, so you may get some bad results during this Dasha. Bitterness in your speech will increase during this time. As egoistic tendencies dominate, you may hurt the feelings of your neighbors and loved ones. There is a possibility of profit in business and trade. You may buy a house, or items of daily use will increase. Allegations of theft or situations of dispute may arise from opponents or government organizations. Besides this, some auspicious and religious events can be organized at home. For some reasons, you may have to stay away from your spouse, children, or family.
Mars-Ketu: During the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 4 months and 27 days. Both Mars and Ketu are inauspicious planets, so you will have to face some adverse situations during this period. God will take a difficult test of yours. You may have health and stomach-related problems during this time. You may experience trouble due to stomach ache, high fever, etc. Differences may arise between you and your siblings, especially with a younger brother where you may face challenges. You may face accidents or any surgery (operation). You will be extremely powerful during this time, although your attitude will be painful. Therefore, being too powerful can make you overconfident. Drink plenty of water and stay away from heat. Problems related to wounds or boils may occur.
Mars-Venus: Within the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 1 year and 2 months. Mars is the significator of valor, and Venus is the significator of female happiness, and both planets have a neutral relationship with each other, so you will get mixed results in this Dasha. Your material comforts will increase during this time. Attraction towards relationships that bring you joy will be strong. Benefits will come through your spouse or loved one, and you will enjoy material comforts. There may be differences with a person of the opposite sex, so try to keep the relationship normal with them. On one hand, you will gain profits, while on the other hand, expenses will also increase, so there will be a need to maintain balance in financial matters. You will be able to go abroad during this time. You may engage in travel and any art or entertainment-related activities.
Mars-Sun: Within the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 4 months and 6 days. There is a feeling of mutual friendship between the Sun and Mars, and both are planets of the fire element. With the combination of Mars and the Sun, energy will increase, and its widespread impact will be seen. You will receive financial and other benefits during this time, and your social prestige will also increase. Opponents will not dare to face you, and you will put an end to their existence. If you have any legal case pending in court, the decision may come in your favor. During this time, you will want to visit forests and green areas. Also, there may be differences with your father or relatives during this period. Disputes can also happen with teachers, guides, or gurus. You will be optimistic and strong, and you will be able to use your power courageously everywhere. There may be a dispute with a family member. You will need to pay attention to your health during this time.
Mars-Moon: During the Mahadasha of Mars, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 7 months. There is a feeling of mutual friendship between Mars and the Moon, although there is a difference in their natures. Where Mars is a planet of the fire element, the Moon is a planet of the water element. Therefore, the combination of these two planets will generate a lot of energy. As a result, you will get mixed results. Your respect at the workplace will increase during this time, and there is a possibility of progress at work. You will receive benefits from various fields, and your financial condition will also become strong. You will continue to get help and cooperation from friends. Give up laziness so that your work is not affected by feelings of laziness in daily life. During this Dasha, you will receive love and respect from others, and you will be able to stay happy. However, problems like phlegm (Kapha) may still occur. You will be enthusiastic about everything.
Rahu-Rahu: During the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Rahu will be 2 years, 8 months, and 12 days. The planet Rahu possesses revolutionary ideas. It is the significator of thoughts, illusions, hypnotism, and rapid events. During this time, Rahu will have a greater impact on your life. As a result, you may take some wrong decisions which could damage your image in public life. You may go against traditions, and your loved ones may not like this mindset. You may suffer from secret diseases or other illnesses, and your treatment will not be that easy in this situation. Disputes and wealth loss may happen during this time. If you have a desire to go abroad and you are trying for it, then you are likely to get success. Also, avoid contaminated food. Because eating bad food can cause infections and stomach aches. Opponents will dominate you, which will increase mental stress. There is a possibility of sudden success in terms of career. You will act smartly to live a happy life and achieve success. Think carefully before making important decisions.
Rahu-Jupiter: During the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be 2 years, 4 months, and 24 days. Rahu and Jupiter do not have a good relationship with each other. Since Jupiter is an auspicious planet while Rahu is an inauspicious planet, you will see mixed results in this state. Your health will be good during this time, and if you are suffering from any long-term disease, it will improve. You will dominate your enemies and opponents. There is a possibility of getting benefits from a higher institution. You will achieve financial gains, and the birth of a child at home is possible, which will bring you joy. Apart from this, any religious and auspicious work can be completed at home. Your inclination towards devotion and spirituality will increase. You will learn and want to learn about mystical sciences. Sudden losses, disputes, and obstacles are likely to occur. You will either have a religious inclination or become ideologically rich. In this state, your brain power and knowledge will increase, and you will be able to talk among people on various subjects.
Rahu-Saturn: During the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Saturn will be 2 years, 10 months, and 6 days. Both Rahu and Saturn are friendly planets, but both are known as inauspicious planets. Saturn is naturally slow, while Rahu has a sense of speed, so these two planets cast opposite effects on human life. Mental stress will increase during this time, and your energy will be used in the opposite direction. This will affect your decision-making ability. Siblings, loved ones, and friends may have to face problems. You may have to stay away from them for some time during this period. There is a possibility of going abroad or moving away from your current place. Also, your name and fame at the workplace may decrease, so pay attention to every small thing related to work and try carefully. There may be Pitta-related problems in the body. Mental instability will be there during this time, so act with restraint, forget the past, and work hard.
Rahu-Mercury: During the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 2 years, 6 months, and 18 days. Rahu and Mercury have a normal relationship with each other, so you can expect pleasant results during this state. Your brain capacity and intellectual knowledge will increase during this time. You will make good use of your intellectual ability and concentration when needed. You will be happy getting the support of siblings and friends. Social life will increase, and you will often be out of the house to attend social events. A new relationship may begin in your life. In addition, you will be successful in accumulating wealth. You will receive income and growth from many sources, and the circulation of capital will continue as usual. Your name will get a new identity, and fame will increase. Working under high tension will make you feel tired.
Rahu-Ketu: During the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 1 year and 18 days. Both Rahu and Ketu are inauspicious planets, so during this state period, you will need to be careful and be ready to face some challenges. Loss of wealth and reduction in income may occur during this time. Financial conditions are likely to deteriorate. Try to stay away from any act or conspiracy due to which you may be defamed in society. If you have children, they may have health issues, so take special care of them. Also, if you have pets, then health issues related to pets may arise in this case. Opponents will dominate you. There will be a fear of theft or arson. During this time, you may suffer from problems like accidents, surgery, fever, etc. Avoid consuming contaminated food because it can prove to be fatal for you.
Rahu-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 3 years. Venus is said to be the significator of beauty, material comforts, and desires, whereas Rahu is the significator of quick and major changes. The combination of these two planets increases human hopes, ambitions, and the desire to achieve them in a short time. You will get mixed results during this time, but most of them will be pleasant. Your sensual thoughts will increase during this period. You will have a desire in your mind to engage in sexual activities. You may buy a new vehicle, get material comforts, and go on a foreign trip. Your social circle will grow, and you will benefit in many ways. There is a possibility of getting benefits from the government. If you are married, there is a possibility of a new relationship, so stay away from such relationships and enjoy your married life. If you are unmarried, then you will get someone's support, and a new romantic relationship will be formed. During this time, you may also have a love marriage. Also, health disorders may cause problems, opponents will dominate you, and there is a possibility of disputes with family members. During this time, you will harbor a big and revolutionary thought, because of which you may even go against the family's thinking in many matters. Overall, you will benefit and material comforts will increase during this time.
Rahu-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 10 months and 24 days. Rahu and the Sun harbor feelings of enmity towards each other. Generally, Rahu gives inauspicious results, but sometimes it improves human life. During this time, you will show great interest in religious and holy activities. You will be more generous and religious than before. Your victory in disputes and other sectors will be as a winner. However, your opponents will also be strong, and they may try to defeat you. Stay away from contaminated food, fire, and weapons during this time. Additionally, you may become prone to infectious diseases. You may go on a foreign trip, or for some reason, you may have to move away from your current residence. You may suffer from fever and diarrhea. Do not get involved in any legal matter and avoid interference. Because this can be the cause of your defamation, and you may also have to pay a heavy price for it. Maintain good relations with higher officials.
Rahu-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 1 year and 6 months. The Moon and Rahu harbor feelings of enmity towards each other. Generally, Rahu gives inauspicious results, but sometimes it is quite beneficial for a person. During this time, the influence of Rahu will dominate your mind and brain. You may be troubled by mental stress, or you may become overly ambitious about something. You will enjoy material comforts, and the inflow of money may increase. During this time, you will also enjoy delicious food. Pranayama will be beneficial for you to relieve mental stress. Apart from this, disputes with family members may happen during this time, and there will be a fear of water. You may have to face judicial cases. Try to stay away from any kind of dispute and take care of your loved ones. If you succeed in achieving mental peace, you will enjoy material happiness.
Rahu-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Rahu, the Antardasha of Mars will be 1 year and 18 days. Rahu and Mars do not have a good relationship with each other. These two planets harbor feelings of enmity towards each other. You may face some differences and disputes during this time. However, you will have to face all these challenges with courage. If there is mental stress, restlessness will increase, which will be clearly visible on your face. So avoid arguing with your loved ones and maintain mutual harmony. Also, there is a possibility of a job change and promotion at the workplace. The combination of Rahu and Mars will affect you during this time. It can impact your health, so pay attention to health, and if you are married, then you need to pay attention to the health of your spouse and children.
Jupiter-Jupiter: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be approximately 2 years, 1 month, and 18 days. The planet Jupiter is said to be the significator of knowledge, progress, good luck, faith, fame, law, and children, etc. In the case of girls, it is also the significator of marriage. The planet Jupiter controls body fat. During this time, the planet Jupiter will have a great impact on your life. There is a possibility of getting benefits from the government and higher institutions. Your plans and works will be successful. You will be able to make the right decisions. If you are studying or learning something, then you are likely to get good results during this time. Also, your concentration to learn something new will increase. There will be a strong desire for gaining knowledge, and you will get the support of scholars and intellectuals. If married and having a family, there will be financial gain. Social prestige will increase. Luck will help you at every step, and your personality will improve. Along with being generous and charitable, the inclination towards religious activities will increase.
Jupiter-Saturn: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Saturn will be approximately 2 years, 6 months, and 12 days. One planet maintains a normal relationship with the other between Jupiter and Saturn, so you may get mixed results during this Dasha. During this time, you will be more interested in charity, religion, or social work. You will have the feeling of helping others. On the other hand, you may get involved in some relationships, although this relationship will not prove to be good for you. Along with loss of wealth, there is a possibility of a decline in health. You will prefer to stay united. If the situation goes against you, you will become unstable, and a feeling of jealousy towards others may arise. Apart from this, mental stress will dominate you. If you have children, they may become the cause of financial loss. Avoid making any important decisions during this time and postpone them for a while. You will get good results during this time by engaging in spiritual thinking, and you may become more active in activities related to religion and spirituality.
Jupiter-Mercury: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 2 years, 3 months, and 6 days. Both Jupiter and Mercury are auspicious planets. However, these two planets do not have a good relationship with each other, so you will get mixed results in this Dasha. But most of the time, the results will be in your favor. During this time, you will be able to make profits in your business and trade. If you are a government employee or officer, you can receive benefits, and higher-ranking officers will also be on your side. Your inclination during this time will be immersed in the worship of God, and you will also be able to go on a pilgrimage. Also, you may buy a new vehicle during this time. If you have children, you will spend good time with them, and they will keep giving you joy. You will feel inner peace and be able to stay happy with your family. Your versatility during this time will result in an increase in wealth, and the possibility of going abroad or traveling will also be strong.
Jupiter-Ketu: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 11 months and 6 days. Jupiter and Ketu do not have a good relationship with each other. Because Jupiter is an auspicious planet while Ketu is an inauspicious planet, you will get mixed results during this Dasha. During this time, you will keep yourself busy with religious work and will be more excited to go on a pilgrimage. You will benefit in many ways, and your financial condition will also become strong. You may have differences with gurus, teachers, elder family members, and authorities at the workplace. Apart from this, be careful of weapons and anger. There is less possibility of having good relations with servants or subordinate employees at the workplace. You may have a dispute with them, so exercise restraint in your behavior. If mental stress is excessive, your decision-making ability will be affected.
Jupiter-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 2 years and 8 months. Both Jupiter and Venus are auspicious planets, but while Jupiter considers Venus as an enemy, Venus maintains a normal attitude towards Jupiter. That is why you will get mixed results within this Dasha period. During this time, you will enjoy material comforts. Along with an increase in social prestige, there will be profits. There is a possibility of promotion and salary increase at the workplace. You will be able to buy a new vehicle. On the other hand, differences with men/women may arise. You may feel jealous of others. Ego may increase in you. Apart from this, you may have a separation from your friends. You may suffer from wind (Vata) disorders and itching. Your inclination towards inauspicious acts may increase. Your knowledge will increase, and people will praise you. Overall, during this Dasha period, you will find happiness, and some opponents may also arise.
Jupiter-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 9 months and 18 days. Both Jupiter and the Sun are friendly planets and have a good relationship with each other. The Sun is the king of the nine planets, and Jupiter is its minister, so you will get very good results during this Dasha period. If you are married, you will be happy giving birth to a child during this time. Financial gains and income will increase. Social and professional prestige will rise. You are likely to get administrative authority, or you will dominate your rivals in such a way that they will not be able to gather the courage to face you. You will feel happy and joyful inside, and there will be an atmosphere of happiness around you. Apart from this, your health will be good, and if you are suffering from any chronic disease, you will see improvement. The government or high-ranking officials will stand by you. You may also receive honors through them. During this time, you may also receive praise for some work.
Jupiter-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 1 year and 4 months. Jupiter considers the Moon as its friend, but the Moon has neutral feelings towards Jupiter. Both are considered auspicious planets, and their combination gives auspicious results. During this time, you will receive benefits, especially from government organizations. If you are working in government service, you will get many auspicious results during this time. With the help of women, you will get opportunities along with financial gains, your knowledge will increase, and this time will be the most progressive time of your life. If you are unmarried, you may get married during this time. You will be able to execute your plans, and as a result, your social circle will grow.
Jupiter-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Mars will be for 11 months and 6 days. Both Jupiter and Mars are friendly and have a good relationship with each other. You will get many good results during this Dasha period. Mars is a cruel planet while Jupiter is an auspicious planet, so its results may also be slow; however, overall, you will get mixed results from the influence of Jupiter and Mars. During this time, you will be able to conquer rivals and competitors. Those people will not have the courage to face you. Your good work will bring you fame and recognition in society, and people will also be impressed by your work. Besides this, health may remain a bit weak. You may suffer from fever and headache. If Mars is not giving auspicious results, you will lack energy. On the other hand, in matters related to law, you may achieve success from government work and gain benefits.
Jupiter-Rahu: In the Mahadasha of Jupiter, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 2 years, 4 months, and 24 days. Jupiter and Rahu do not have a good relationship with each other. Jupiter is an auspicious planet while Rahu is an inauspicious planet, so in its Dasha results, inauspicious results will increase more than auspicious results. Family disputes are likely during this time, and mental instability will also increase. Your decision-making ability will also be affected during this period. Opponents will try to damage your image. Try to avoid legal disputes. Apart from this, due to misunderstandings, there can be a rift in your relationship, so do not give importance to unnecessary things.
Saturn-Saturn: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Saturn will be 3 years and 3 days. Lord Saturn is said to be the supreme magistrate. He gives people the results of their good and bad deeds. Saturn naturally loves justice and discipline. Saturn is the significator of discipline, old age, responsibility, longevity, servants, associates, separation, spirituality, and depth, etc. Saturn is a planet of the air element. During this time, there may be a dispute with a family or loved ones. There can also be separation from family life. Health is likely to remain weak. Ego and jealousy can increase in nature. At times of disappointment in the mind, there may also be a feeling of well-being during this time, and there will be no support from loved ones either. Also, government departments or high officials will not be on your side. Small disputes and instability can be painful for you. You may become disillusioned with worldly life. You will not get results as expected. During this time, you will prefer to meditate in solitude. You will have to work very hard at the workplace.
Saturn-Mercury: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 2 years, 8 months, and 9 days. The planets Saturn and Mercury maintain a good relationship with each other, so you will get good results during this Dasha period. Your health will be good during this time, and you will gain fame. You will get many benefits and prosperity in life. Your inclination towards religious activities will increase. People will be impressed by your restrained behavior. Furthermore, you may start a new business. Besides this, if married, there will be happiness from your spouse and children. Social prestige will increase, and you will gain a new identity in society. Scholars and intellectuals will praise you, and you will also get good results through them. Phlegm-related disorders in the body can cause problems. Skin, teeth, or throat problems may suddenly arise.
Saturn-Ketu: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 1 year, 1 month, and 9 days. Saturn and Ketu are inauspicious planets, although there is no mutual good feeling between them, so you will get dull or inauspicious results during this Dasha period. Perhaps you may have a dispute with bad people during this time. Your experience can be sad. Mental tension and instability will increase. This time will be very good for spiritual work. Concentration in religion and religious works will increase. During this Dasha period, there is a possibility of separation from your loved one or dear ones. Apart from this, your health may decline. You may be troubled by Vata (wind) and Pitta (bile) related disorders. If you are married, there may be separation from your spouse or child during this time, or you may have to go away from them for some important work.
Saturn-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 3 years and 2 months. Saturn and Venus have mutual friendship. Saturn is naturally an inauspicious planet, whereas Venus is an auspicious planet, so in this Dasha of Saturn and Venus, you will suddenly get mixed and diverse results. During this time, you will enjoy the better moments of life. You will get happiness from your life partner or children. If you are unmarried, you may get married. If you are married and desire to have a child, then in this case, if you are active in politics, there is a possibility of getting massive public support. Besides this, children's fascination and affection for you will increase even more. At the workplace, you may get a high position, or you may become the head of an organization. Luck will favor you. You will dominate the opposition.
Saturn-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 11 months and 12 days. According to Vedic astrology, Lord Saturn is the son of the Sun, but there is mutual enmity between both father and son. Therefore, you will get more inauspicious results than auspicious ones in this Dasha. This period cannot be said to be auspicious for your spouse and children, and you may also have differences with your siblings. Health is likely to remain slightly weak, and some diseases may cause problems. Someone may raise false allegations against you. During this time, you will work hard, but the results will not be as desired. Apart from this, there is also a possibility of losing money. Opponents may speak out against you. Mental stress will increase. If a judicial case is going on, the results will not be in your favor. There is also a possibility of theft. You may suffer from stomach diseases during this time. Pranayama will be beneficial for you. Avoid getting involved in any kind of controversy and legal matters, as it can damage your image. Besides this, stay away from immoral acts.
Saturn-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of the Moon will be for 1 year and 7 months. There is no feeling of mutual friendship between Saturn and the Moon. Saturn is an inauspicious planet, whereas the Moon is the significator of the mind, so during this Dasha period, the results of various actions are less likely to be in your favor. Differences with your spouse may happen during this time. Due to increasing bitterness in the relationship, there is also a possibility of separation from the spouse. Besides this, your spouse's health problems may also be a cause of concern for you, and opposition from family members may increase. Disputes with loved ones and women are possible, which can harm your family life. Apart from this, there will be a lack of happiness in life. Instability will increase due to mental stress, and you will feel isolated. You will like spending some time in solitude. Health may remain weak, but during this time you will gain wealth, and income will increase.
Saturn-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Mars will be for approximately 1 year, 1 month, and 9 days. Saturn and Mars are inauspicious planets, and there is mutual enmity between both, so many challenges may arise before you during this Dasha period. You will have to face them with courage. Health-related problems may occur during this time. There is a possibility of fever, injury, or accident. Drive carefully during this time and do not be careless at all. Try to avoid unnecessary disputes, as this will result in losses. Some problems may also keep appearing at the workplace. You may return to your birthplace during this time. Loss from thieves and fire is also possible. Besides this, you may be forced to stay away from your family, especially your spouse and children. Forget the differences with brothers, friends, and female friends, and build good relations with them. Avoid doing any such work due to which you will get a bad name in society. Control your anger to live a good life and do not worry unnecessarily.
Saturn-Rahu: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 2 years, 10 months, and 6 days. Saturn and Rahu are inauspicious planets, and they do not have a good relationship with each other. So you will generally get bad results in this Dasha. But in some situations, there are possibilities of unexpected results as well. Any chronic or hereditary disease may trouble you during this time, so pay attention to your health regularly. Financial loss is also possible. There will be a fear of theft and robbery during this Dasha period. Apart from this, you may also fall victim to an accident during this time, so be careful. You may be troubled by fever, joint pain, and gas-related disorders. Opponents may try to damage your image. Mental stress will increase, but positive thinking will take you forward in life.
Saturn-Jupiter: In the Mahadasha of Saturn, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be approximately 2 years, 6 months, and 12 days. Jupiter is an auspicious planet, whereas Saturn is an inauspicious planet. Both planets have a neutral relationship with each other, so you will get mixed results in various fields at this time. Your interest in religious and spiritual activities will increase during this time. You may go on travel/pilgrimage, and you will meet religious and learned people. A feeling of social service will develop in you, and you will help others. You will achieve success. Your senior colleagues will be a big reason for this success. Additionally, your family size will increase, and social prestige will rise. Many people will come to you seeking advice. You may get a promotion at the workplace. By working hard and doing good deeds, you will get name and fame.
Mercury-Mercury: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 2 years, 4 months, and 27 days. Mercury is the significator of intellect, education, language, communication, writing, business, and commerce, etc. Generally, Mercury is considered an auspicious planet. Vata, Pitta, and Kapha are controlled in the body by the planet Mercury. Inauspicious results are obtained when Mercury is afflicted. Due to the influence of Mercury, a person becomes a good businessman, as well as a scholar, teacher, and thinker; they get popularity and love in society. Throughout this entire period, the planet Mercury will have an impact on your life. Your intellectual capacity will increase during this time, and you will have a desire to learn something new. Your full focus and dedication will be towards learning new things related to life. You will be able to complete tasks with your intellect. Your social reputation will increase, and there is a possibility of financial gain. You will like to learn mantras, etc. Besides this, you will get new clothes during this time. You may also think of buying a new house or property. There will be full cooperation from siblings. They will help you financially and ideologically. You will receive benefits through loved ones and enlightened citizens of society. You will achieve success with advanced thinking. There is a possibility of achieving success in fields related to commerce and statistics, etc.
Mercury-Ketu: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 11 months and 27 days. Mercury and Ketu are neutral towards each other. Since Ketu is an inauspicious planet, you will get mixed results during this time. You may also receive some inauspicious results among these. You may have to suffer for your loved ones during this time. People very dear to you may hurt you knowingly or unknowingly. There will be a lack of happiness in life, and you will feel isolated. If you suffer from mental stress, you might not be able to focus on other aspects of life. In addition, your opposing forces will become powerful and may try to defeat you. You will have to work hard to keep the situation in your favor. Some obstacles may come in work during this time.
Mercury-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 2 years and 10 months. Mercury and Venus have a good relationship with each other. Venus is an auspicious planet, while Mercury is also a planet that generally gives auspicious results. So, in this Dasha of Mercury and Venus, you will get auspicious results. You can expect big changes and progress in life. During this time, you will meet wise and rich people of society, and you will benefit from their help and guidance. You will be involved in religious and spiritual work. You will worship God with devotion and welcome guests. You may also do charity. During this time, you will be able to buy expensive clothes, jewelry, and other material things. Apart from this, you will be very happy having the company of friends, especially male/female friends. You may go for picnics, and you will also find satisfaction in eating at cinemas and hotels. During this period, dedicate more time to entertainment and artistic work. There will be prosperity and happiness in your life during this time.
Mercury-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 10 months and 6 days. Mercury and the Sun have a normal relationship with each other. The Sun is a planet of the fire element, whereas Mercury is a calm and gentle planet. Mercury and the Sun together form Budhaditya Yoga. This results in a person gaining knowledge, name, and fame, so you will get mixed results during this Dasha period. You will be able to buy a new and good vehicle during this time. If you are working in government service, then you will benefit in this field. Prosperity will come into your life. You will be able to enjoy physical comforts. Besides this, if married, a child may be born at home. Your inclination towards virtuous and generous deeds will increase. You will be able to receive honors from government departments. Senior officials will be on your side. There is a possibility of having eye-related problems. In addition, your working style may remain unorganized.
Mercury-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 1 year and 5 days. Mercury and the Moon have an opposite relationship with each other, so you will get mixed results in this Dasha. Usually, this result will be weak. Your health may remain weak during this time. The strength of your enemies and opponents will grow, and these people may try to damage your image. You may have to face challenges. Generally, you should be careful while driving because there is a possibility of accidents during this time. Besides this, you may have to face mental stress due to many upcoming controversies. Health-related disorders can increase your problems. If you can maintain mental peace by doing Pranayama, it will be good for you.
Mercury-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Mars will be approximately 11 months and 27 days. Mars is known as a fierce planet, whereas Mercury is considered auspicious. These two planets do not have a good relationship with each other. Therefore, mixed results will be obtained during this period. By getting involved in religious activities during this time, you can gain recognition and fame in society. You will use your power correctly according to your discretion. You will be able to get benefits from the government or higher officials. Apart from this, your health may remain weak during this time. You may suffer from eye pain and arthritis. However, there is no need to worry; you will recover very soon and enjoy life. Expenses will increase, and as a result, unrest may come to mind. The language of your spouse and children towards you may be harsh.
Mercury-Rahu: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 2 years, 6 months, and 18 days. Rahu and Mercury have mutual friendship, but Rahu is an inauspicious planet whereas Mercury is a beneficial planet, so you will get mixed results during this Dasha period. You will benefit with the help of friends and relatives during this time. Your neighbors and loved ones will help you. Your knowledge and happiness will increase. You will become prosperous, and this time will be progressive for you. You may get benefits from a government department or high-ranking official. There may be stomach or eye-related problems. There is a possibility of harm from fire, toxic substances, or water, so be a little careful. There is a possibility of loss of wealth and defamation, so work carefully in economic and social sectors. You may achieve unprecedented success in the business sector.
Mercury-Jupiter: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be approximately 2 years, 3 months, and 6 days. Mercury and Jupiter are auspicious planets, and both give auspicious results. However, Mercury and Jupiter do not have a good relationship with each other. So you will get mixed results during this Dasha period. Your family may grow during this time. If you are married, there is a possibility of a child being born in your house. The financial condition will become strong, and income will increase, along with possible disputes. Relationships with loved ones like teachers, guides, etc., are also likely to be affected. Besides this, there may be disputes in the family. As a result, bitterness can increase in relations with parents. If employed in government service, you may get a promotion, and senior officials may also stand by your side. Your inclination towards holy deeds will increase, and your tendency for charity will grow. You may suffer from fever.
Mercury-Saturn: In the Mahadasha of Mercury, the Antardasha of Saturn will be approximately 2 years, 8 months, and 9 days. The planets Saturn and Mercury maintain a good relationship with each other, although there are many differences between the natures of these two planets. Therefore, you will get mixed results during this Dasha period. You may be involved in religious and pious works during this time. There will be a feeling of social service. You are likely to get financial benefits, which will make your financial condition even stronger. Helping someone special and common people will bring you benefits from them, and they will also stand by you. At the same time, if you are involved in agricultural work, there is a possibility of loss. Your nature will be calm, kind, and gentle. Your prestige will increase. You may suffer from some health-related problems. Leg-related problems may arise.
Ketu-Ketu: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 4 months and 27 days. In Vedic astrology, Ketu is considered an inauspicious planet. It is the significator of religion, intellect, mystery, dreams, black magic, weapons, and spirituality. During this time, you will be completely under the influence of Ketu. Dangers and obstacles may come your way during this period. Due to increasing instability, you may become disillusioned with material life, and your inclination towards religious ceremonies may become strong. As a result, you will want to participate in religious rituals and will also be attracted to activities like Tantra-Mantra. Besides this, the health of your spouse and children may remain weak. There will be a lack of happiness in life, and there will be a possibility of losing money. Your rivals and enemies will gain power. To maintain peace and harmony in life, you will have to control your anger and instability. Worship Lord Ganesha and spend some time bathing to attain mental peace.
Ketu-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 1 year and 2 months. Ketu is an inauspicious planet, whereas Venus is considered an auspicious planet. Venus is the significator of physical comforts and love, whereas Ketu is the significator of separation. Under such circumstances, you will get mixed results during this Dasha period. Due to many kinds of thoughts coming to mind, there can be a state of confusion in life. Mental stress may increase during this time. At the same time, your spouse and children will also face problems. For this, they will feel mental stress. Your health may remain slightly weak during this time. There is a possibility of disputes with relatives, siblings, and loved ones. Your health will be weak during this time, and you may suffer from fever. If you are married, your family size may increase. There is a possibility of the birth of a child at home. Challenges may come in married life. In addition, to avoid problems like separation, avoid taking any major decisions during this time and try to avoid controversies to maintain cordial relations.
Ketu-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 4 months and 6 days. The Sun and Ketu are inauspicious planets. In Vedic astrology, both planets are considered aggressive and opposed to each other. In this Antardasha of the Sun and Mahadasha of Ketu, you may have to face health-related problems. Body temperature may rise, and aggressiveness in nature may increase. During this time, you may be troubled by fever, physical pain, and Pitta-related disorders. One of your relatives may suffer from the fear of a major disease. You may go abroad or travel outside during this period. Due to ideological differences, your own people may stand against you. Besides this, there will be a lack of happiness in life, and mental stress may increase. Financial loss may also occur during this time. You will have to work hard to achieve desired success and create positive situations.
Ketu-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 7 months. The Moon and Ketu do not have a good relationship with each other. The Moon is the significator of the mind, whereas Ketu is the significator of separation as well as an inauspicious planet. In this Dasha, you will get slightly stressful results over a long period. Mental tension will increase during this time, and your mood will change frequently. You will find unrest in the glitter of the world, and you may become disillusioned with material life. You could fall victim to Tantra-Mantra and black magic. Due to the confused state of your mind, there is a possibility of your important works being affected. Besides this, there may be a feeling of laziness in your spouse or children. Servants will not work according to your wishes. Money may be spent on unnecessary things. There is also a possibility of losing money. You may face sorrow regarding children, and mental balance will become unstable. Do Pranayama and pray regularly. To maintain peace and harmony in life, you should not spend too much time in solitude.
Ketu-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Mars will be approximately 4 months and 27 days. Both Ketu and Mars are inauspicious planets. According to Vedic astrology, Ketu gives results like Mars. Therefore, during this Dasha period, you will face or have to face challenges and hardships. Disputes in family life may occur in this Dasha. Your relationship with your spouse, children, siblings, and other loved ones may be affected. A situation of dispute between you and them may arise during this time. Jealousy may enter their nature. Besides this, your health may remain weak. Blood-related diseases, high and low blood pressure, skin, and allergy disorders can cause problems. You may undergo surgery or have an accident during this time. So be careful. Be alert while driving, and stay away from fire and weapons. Your courage and hard work will increase at the workplace.
Ketu-Rahu: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 1 year and 18 days. Both Rahu and Ketu are inauspicious planets, so you may get some inauspicious results during this Dasha period. Your decision-making ability will be affected in this Dasha of Rahu-Ketu, so you should postpone all major decisions during this time. Expenses on unnecessary and futile travels may be high. You will have to be careful of theft, or if you get involved in any bad deeds, as a result, your name is likely to be defamed, and the police/administration may take strict action against you. You will be able to start many tasks at the same time, but later, due to a lack of interest, these tasks will not lead to fruitful results, and you will leave them midway. Disputes with inauspicious people may occur. Overall, you will be in tension during this time, and you will have to wait until this Dasha ends for better times.
Ketu-Jupiter: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be approximately 11 months and 6 days. Jupiter is an auspicious planet. Both Ketu and Jupiter represent religious thoughts in life. You will get good results during this Dasha period. As a result, your sorrows and hardships may go away, and long-standing problems will also end. Your inclination towards religious activities will increase during this time. Consequently, you will be involved in many religious activities. You will respect your elders, teachers, and guides. There is a possibility of getting benefits from the government. Benefits are likely from government departments and government officials. Besides this, you will remain healthy and happy. If there is any chronic disease, it will be cured quickly. If married, your happiness will double upon the birth of a child. You will be able to buy land. Overall, during this Dasha period, you will achieve continuous progress in your life.
Ketu-Saturn: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Saturn will be approximately 1 year, 1 month, and 9 days. Both Saturn and Ketu are inauspicious planets, and they have mutual enmity. Therefore, this Dasha will have a negative impact on you. You will feel mental stress during this time. For some reasons, you may have to stay away from your family and near and dear ones. If you have already planned to go somewhere, you may go abroad. There will be a fear of getting involved in disputes, so try to stay away from all kinds of controversies. Be careful of enemies because they can cause you physical harm. Besides this, you may face financial loss. Work hard and with dedication at the workplace. Do not get involved in any controversy during this time. Because there is a fear of defamation. It is a difficult time. But if you focus only on your work, the results will be in your favor.
Ketu-Mercury: In the Mahadasha of Ketu, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 11 months and 27 days. There is a neutral relationship between Ketu and Mercury. Mercury is a beneficial planet, so you will mostly get good results during this Dasha period. You will be happy getting the company of friends and loved ones during this time. Your social contacts may increase. Your spouse and children will receive material benefits and will be extremely happy. You will try to purchase new things during this time. You will show interest in learning during this period, and this will increase your knowledge. Besides this, the flow of money for profit will be good, and the economic condition will become strong. If there is a feeling of happiness in the mind, success will come, and health will improve.
Venus-Venus: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Venus will be approximately 3 years and 4 months. According to Vedic astrology, Venus is very important in human life. Venus is the significator of physical happiness, prosperity, and success. Venus represents love, marriage, life partner, beauty, art, fame, and happiness, etc. During this time, Venus will have a full impact on your life. This Dasha will bring auspicious times into your life, and you will be very happy. You will get a lot of benefits during this time. If you are married, then your married life will be happy. Your social prestige will increase, and there is a possibility of some auspicious works being completed in the family. Your inclination towards religious activities will increase even more. If you are unmarried, your search for a life partner may end during this time. Joyful moments will come in love relationships, and you will spend good time with your loved one. You will buy expensive clothes and bed sheets. There is a possibility of financial gain, and you will gain new recognition and fame in society. You will dominate your opponents.
Venus-Sun: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of the Sun will be approximately 1 year. Venus is an auspicious planet, whereas the Sun is a cruel planet. Both planets do not have a good relationship with each other, so you may have to face some challenges during this Dasha period. There may be a fear of getting fines or punishment from the government and government departments during this time. There may be a possibility of disputes with loved ones or relatives. There may be losses in work related to agriculture and cattle. Your opponents will be powerful, and they may try to harm you in many ways. Additionally, the number of your rivals may increase. Your health may remain weak. Problems related to the head, eyes, chest, and stomach may arise. Therefore, it will be necessary to pay attention to your health. You should take care to maintain a good relationship with your spouse during this time.
Venus-Moon: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of the Moon will be approximately 1 year and 8 months. Both Venus and the Moon are auspicious and feminine in nature. Although Venus and the Moon do not have a good relationship with each other, you will get mixed results in this Dasha. You may get involved in some pious acts during this time. You will show interest in worshipping various deities. If any judicial case is ongoing, the decision will come in your favor. There will be victory in all kinds of disputes, but opponents may suddenly harm you. You will receive benefits through women. You will feel love and joy, and you can share your feelings with your loved one. Apart from this, there may be disorders related to the head, nails, Pitta, and secret diseases. Be careful of wild animals.
Venus-Mars: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Mars will be approximately 1 year and 2 months. Mars is an inauspicious planet, whereas Venus is an auspicious planet. These two planets have a normal relationship with each other, so mixed results will be obtained during this Dasha period. Sensual thoughts may increase in your behavior during this time. Mars provides energy, whereas Venus is significant for love, so with the combination of these two, you may indulge in sensual acts. You may buy land. Along with this, you will attain physical pleasure through your spouse. The flow of income will be good, and the financial condition will also become strong. A situation of dispute may arise in married life. Additionally, your spouse's health may decline. Besides this, you will be able to attain gains as a result of courage and valor. Your health may remain weak due to injuries and Pitta-related disorders during this time. There will be a lack of interest in many things. Sometimes you may try to dominate your spouse. But this behavior of yours will create problems for your married life.
Venus-Rahu: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Rahu will be approximately 3 years. Rahu is an inauspicious planet, whereas Venus is an auspicious planet. Rahu is the cause of sudden changes and uncontrollability, whereas Venus is the cause of love and happiness. The combination of Rahu and Venus will increase sensuality in your behavior. Since Rahu and Venus are mutually friendly, you will get mixed results in this Dasha. You may think about marrying your lover during this time. You might go against your family and traditions to marry your loved one. Bitterness may exist in relationships with relatives and loved ones. In addition, friends and loved ones can also cause you problems. There will be a fear of fire. Due to a good financial position, you may buy some new things. Try to control your emotions and actions. Also, act wisely to avoid getting into any kind of dispute.
Venus-Jupiter: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Jupiter will be approximately 2 years and 8 months. Both Jupiter and Venus are considered auspicious. Although these two planets do not maintain a good relationship with each other. However, you will have very good results during this Dasha period. You will be very happy due to excess profits during this time. You will be able to buy expensive clothes and jewelry. A miraculous change will come in your financial condition due to growth and profits. Your social respect will increase due to charity work. You will achieve success in the work you do. Additionally, there is a possibility of promotion at the workplace. You will get new recognition and fame for your good behavior and work. People in society will come to you seeking advice. However, in family life, there may be a dispute with your spouse. The health of your spouse or children may decline, or they may remain under mental stress.
Venus-Saturn: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Saturn will be approximately 3 years and 2 months. This is the most important and long-lasting Dasha. Venus is an auspicious planet, whereas Saturn is an inauspicious planet. The planet Venus is the significator of love, and the planet Saturn is the significator of separation. Although there is a good relationship between these two planets, you will get mixed results in this Dasha. If you do any work with concentration and dedication, this time will be good for you. The amount of hardships will also increase during this time. Your friendship towards people older than your age will grow during this period. You may build friendships with people older than you. Besides this, you will have sensual feelings towards a person of the opposite sex who is older than you. You will be able to dominate your opponents. Buying land, financial gains, and building a house will make your mind happy. Moreover, the social prestige of your friends will increase, and you will also reach new heights in society. If you are working in government service, you are likely to get a promotion along with moving to a place of your choice during this time. You may also have to face separation from your spouse, family, or loved ones during this time.
Venus-Mercury: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Mercury will be approximately 2 years and 10 days. Venus and Mercury are auspicious planets, and there is a friendly relationship between them. Therefore, you can expect good news and good results in this Dasha. The comforts of your friends and children may increase during this time. You will be happy to see prosperity in their lives. With the help of the government or any other organization, you will be able to buy property. Love relationships will grow. You will feel love and joy and will spend good time with your loved one. Besides this, you will enjoy material comforts. You may acquire material goods. During this time, apart from buying a vehicle or new things, you can enjoy entertainment, picnics, and delicious food. Your status in society will increase, and your health will also improve during this Dasha period.
Venus-Ketu: In the Mahadasha of Venus, the Antardasha of Ketu will be approximately 1 year and 2 months. This time will be challenging for you because Venus is an auspicious planet, whereas Ketu is considered inauspicious. The impact of their opposing natures is that on one hand, Venus is the significator of love, attachment, and material comforts, while on the other hand, Ketu is the significator of separation. Disputes and fights can happen without any reason during this time. Restlessness may increase when mental peace is disturbed. There is a possibility of severe illness for one of your relatives or loved ones. The strength of your opponents will increase, and they might try to hurt you. Besides this, disputes and differences can occur in married life. If there is a love relationship, there can be ideological differences. There is also a possibility of mental stress and financial loss.
